findings.title: Weak hash algorithm (MD5) detected in password verification
findings.message: Weak hash algorithm (MD5/SHA1) detected via hashlib. MD5 and SHA1 are cryptographically broken and MUST NOT be used for password hashing, integrity verification, or digital signatures.

findings.title: Hardcoded encryption key in configuration module
findings.message: Hardcoded encryption or secret key detected. Secrets embedded in source code can be extracted by attackers through repository access or binary analysis. Use environment variables or secret managers.

findings.title: Math.random() used for session token generation
findings.message: Insecure pseudo-random number generator (Math.random) detected. Math.random() is not cryptographically secure and MUST NOT be used for security-sensitive operations such as token generation.
